message: Document agent directive and initial unreleased entry

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,10 @@
 
 This file provides guidance to all coding agents (Claude, GPT, etc.) working in this repository.
 
+## Core Directive
+
+- Before answering, if you are unsure, read the relevant code and/or search the web for clarity before responding.
+
 ## Runtime Guardrails
 
 - When using tmux, avoid polling loops like `while tmux has-session …`.

@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@ All notable changes to Poltergeist will be documented in this file.
 
 ## [Unreleased]
 
-- _No entries yet_
+- Fixed the daemon skipping post-start builds by feeding an explicit initial-build marker into the intelligent queue, so every enabled target compiles immediately after `poltergeist haunt` and exposes up-to-date `lastBuild` metadata for `poltergeist status`.
 
 ## [2.1.0] - 2025-11-08
